g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the SAC agent pass into the Gymnasium step function?')
sendPrompt('Why rescale the action from [-1,1] to dB delta before applying it to filter weights?')
sendPrompt('What should _acquire_hardware_telemetry do when the ESP32 is not connected yet?')
sendPrompt('How does StateSpaceFormulator.compute() get called inside the Gym step?')
sendPrompt('What inputs does RewardComputer need from the environment step?')
sendPrompt('What should the info dict contain to support future logging and evaluation?')
sendPrompt('Why is a rich info dict important for future SAC diagnostics?')
sendPrompt('How does the simulated acoustic backend model room reverberation for training?')
sendPrompt('What does HardwareBackend need to do to interface with the ESP32 over serial?')
sendPrompt('When would a ReplayBackend using recorded audio be useful for offline training?')
sendPrompt('What does the SAC agent do with the returned S_t and R_t after each step?')
